name: Makaha Beach
tagline: World-class surf history and world-class sunsets — the Waianae coast's crown jewel.
bestTime: Summer for calm swimming and snorkeling; winter for big wave watching (stay out of water); sunset year-round
insiderTips: Be respectful — this is a very local beach and the community takes pride in it. Summer months bring crystal-clear water and turtles. Don't leave valuables in car. Combine with a drive to Yokohama Bay or Ka'ena Point.
